name: graveyard-village
summary: A village graveyard — headstones in loose rows, older graves sinking into the turf, a central monument or crypt. Enclosed by low wall or hedge rather than a building. A place for vigils, funerals, and things that dig themselves up.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: roughly square or 4:3 — pathways quarter the yard

primary_palette.note: founder's grave as the central monument
memorial obelisk commemorating plague or war dead
angel of mourning at the center

story_prompts: a funeral in progress — mourners at the central mound
fresh grave newly disturbed, dirt scattered outward
night vigil — one bench occupied by a lone gravedigger smoking a pipe
a recent plague has overwhelmed the yard; new markers are wooden, temporary, crowded
the willow has died suddenly and the ravens refuse to land in it

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: outdoor — default to daylight unless a night scene, then 0.2-0.3 with cool tint

anti_patterns: use invisible walls (iw) at the perimeter with a low wall/hedge suggested by props, not full walls
grave markers should be in loose rows, not perfect grid — this is a real yard, not a spreadsheet
avoid symmetry — older markers lean, new ones stand straight
don't over-fill; negative space (turf) is the dominant texture
